    Introducing Base44 Superagents

    The AI agent that does it all, ready in under a minute

    Your superagent can do the work of a personal assistant, support rep, marketing team, analyst - all the help you’ve ever needed. Tell it what to do, it handles the rest.

    Get your Superagent

    Give your Superagent a job

    Your inbox, handled

    “Scan my inbox overnight. Flag anything urgent, draft replies to the easy ones, and send me a WhatsApp summary at 7am with what you handled and what still needs me”

    Leads that never go cold

    “When a new lead comes in, send a personalized follow-up within 10 minutes. No response in 3 days? Follow up again with a different angle”

    Travel, end to end

    “For our planned family trip to NYC in May, alert me when flight prices from London drop, and keep an eye out for family-friendly events happening May 7-18. Send updates to WhatsApp”

    Your personal life, organized

    “I have dinner with Tiffany on Friday but no reservation. Find new cool wine bars in the city with good reviews and book a table for 2 at 8pm, and update Tiffany”

    Your business, on autopilot

    “Every Friday at 5pm, pull this week's sales numbers, support tickets, and marketing metrics. Summarize trends, flag anything that needs attention, and send the report to Slack”

    Your calendar, optimized

    “Every morning, check my calendar. If I have back-to-back meetings with no break, move something or block 30 minutes for lunch. Send me the updated plan on Gmail and Whatsapp”

    Your inbox, handled

    “Scan my inbox overnight. Flag anything urgent, draft replies to the easy ones, and send me a WhatsApp summary at 7am with what you handled and what still needs me”

    Leads that never go cold

    “When a new lead comes in, send a personalized follow-up within 10 minutes. No response in 3 days? Follow up again with a different angle”

    The power of Superagents

    Hassle free

    No Docker, no servers, no SSH, no config files, no Mac Mini. Your Superagent runs with nothing to install, configure, or maintain.

    Always on

    Your Superagent works around the clock handling tasks on your behalf: scheduled jobs, event-based triggers, recurring actions.

    Takes real action

    This isn't a chatbot that gives suggestions. Your Superagent sends messages, follows up with leads, pulls reports, and reacts to events on its own.

    Remembers and evolves

    Every conversation, every preference, every goal, carried across sessions. Your Superagent picks up where it left off, adds new skills, refines its own rules, and gets more useful the longer you use it.

    Lives where you are

    WhatsApp, Telegram, Slack, your browser. No new tools to learn, no new interface to manage. Your Superagent meets you wherever you already work.

    Secure by default

    Permissions-based and sandboxed. Your Superagent only accesses what you explicitly allow. No local servers. No open ports. No infrastructure to manage.

    And many more via APIs or MCPs.

    Plugs into everything you already use. Just ask it to.

    Your Superagent can connect to all tools you already use: Google Calendar, Gmail, Google Drive, Discord, Socials, Slack, your CRM, and more. It pulls data, triggers workflows, and acts across all your tools. All configured through conversation.

    And many more via APIs or MCPs.

    See all
    See all

    Works alongside the data in your Base44 apps

    Your Superagent operates across your Base44 apps: tracking your analytics and users, sending notifications, managing follow-ups, and automating workflows across your database and backend. Same platform. New superpower.

    Get your Superagent

    Frequently asked questions

    What is a Base44 Superagent?

    A personal AI agent that runs tasks for you 24/7. It takes real actions on your behalf and lives inside WhatsApp, Telegram, Slack, or your browser.

    Do I need to know how to code?

    No. You describe what you want in plain language. Your Superagent builds itself.

    What can the Superagent connect to?

    Google Calendar, Gmail, Drive, Socials, Discord, Slack, X, CRMs, task managers, and more.

    Is it safe?

    Yes. Your Superagent only accesses what you explicitly allow. It's sandboxed, permissions-based, and managed by Base44. No local servers, no Docker, no open ports.

    How is this different from a chatbot?

    A chatbot waits for you to ask something and gives you an answer. Your Superagent works proactively: running scheduled jobs, reacting to events, chaining multi-step workflows, and making decisions within your goals. It executes, not just responds.

    Can I use it with my existing Base44 app?

    Yes. Your Superagent can connect to your app's database and backend functions. It can query data, automate workflows, react to database changes, and trigger actions across your entire app.

    Your Superagent is waiting for you.

    Get your Superagent

    Base44 is the AI-powered platform that lets users build fully functioning apps in minutes. Using nothing but natural language, Base44 enables anyone to turn their words into productivity apps, back-office tools, customer portals, or complete enterprise products that are ready to use—no integrations required.
